title: [CI] Windows build failure?
body:
https://github.com/llvm/circt/actions/runs/4959723038/jobs/8874229998

```
FAIL: CIRCT :: firtool/convention.fir (490 of 519)
******************** TEST 'CIRCT :: firtool/convention.fir' FAILED ********************
Script:
--
: 'RUN: at line 1';   d:\a\circt\circt\build_release\bin\firtool.exe D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir --format=fir --parse-only --scalarize-top-module=false --scalarize-ext-modules=false --preserve-aggregate=all | d:\a\circt\circt\llvm\install\bin\filecheck.exe --check-prefix=SCALARIZE_NONE D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir
: 'RUN: at line 2';   d:\a\circt\circt\build_release\bin\firtool.exe D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir --format=fir --parse-only --scalarize-top-module=true  --scalarize-ext-modules=false --preserve-aggregate=all | d:\a\circt\circt\llvm\install\bin\filecheck.exe --check-prefix=SCALARIZE_TOP  D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir
: 'RUN: at line 3';   d:\a\circt\circt\build_release\bin\firtool.exe D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir --format=fir --parse-only --scalarize-top-module=false --scalarize-ext-modules=true  --preserve-aggregate=all | d:\a\circt\circt\llvm\install\bin\filecheck.exe --check-prefix=SCALARIZE_EXT  D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir
: 'RUN: at line 4';   d:\a\circt\circt\build_release\bin\firtool.exe D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir --format=fir --parse-only --scalarize-top-module=true  --scalarize-ext-modules=true  --preserve-aggregate=all | d:\a\circt\circt\llvm\install\bin\filecheck.exe --check-prefix=SCALARIZE_BOTH D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir
--
Exit Code: 3221225477

Command Output (stdout):
--
$ ":" "RUN: at line 1"
$ "d:\a\circt\circt\build_release\bin\firtool.exe" "D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir" "--format=fir" "--parse-only" "--scalarize-top-module=false" "--scalarize-ext-modules=false" "--preserve-aggregate=all"
$ "d:\a\circt\circt\llvm\install\bin\filecheck.exe" "--check-prefix=SCALARIZE_NONE" "D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir"
$ ":" "RUN: at line 2"
$ "d:\a\circt\circt\build_release\bin\firtool.exe" "D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir" "--format=fir" "--parse-only" "--scalarize-top-module=true" "--scalarize-ext-modules=false" "--preserve-aggregate=all"
$ "d:\a\circt\circt\llvm\install\bin\filecheck.exe" "--check-prefix=SCALARIZE_TOP" "D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir"
$ ":" "RUN: at line 3"
$ "d:\a\circt\circt\build_release\bin\firtool.exe" "D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir" "--format=fir" "--parse-only" "--scalarize-top-module=false" "--scalarize-ext-modules=true" "--preserve-aggregate=all"
$ "d:\a\circt\circt\llvm\install\bin\filecheck.exe" "--check-prefix=SCALARIZE_EXT" "D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir"
$ ":" "RUN: at line 4"
$ "d:\a\circt\circt\build_release\bin\firtool.exe" "D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir" "--format=fir" "--parse-only" "--scalarize-top-module=true" "--scalarize-ext-modules=true" "--preserve-aggregate=all"
note: command had no output on stdout or stderr
error: command failed with exit status: 0xc0000005
$ "d:\a\circt\circt\llvm\install\bin\filecheck.exe" "--check-prefix=SCALARIZE_BOTH" "D:\a\circt\circt\test\firtool\convention.fir"

--
```

It seems unlikely that commit broke things, we'll see if it continues to fail.  Weird that it fails this way, somewhat concerning!
